description: Flint attempts to trade for supplies, but encounters Grill, and the Kree begin rounding up children for the Terrigenesis ceremony. Meanwhile, Coulson, Elena, and Mack discuss Kasius' plan to sell Inhumans and realize the guests are arriving for Daisy. Tess warns that the Kree are taking the children for the harvest.

transcript.line: Hey, Gretch. Got your tin right here.
A token? I was hoping for at least three.
Only for my favorite customer. Hey, Citrus, look, I don't have enough today, but maybe tomorrow, you can...
Look, I don't need charity, all right? Only your best offer.
Kasius is breeding Inhumans to sell. Guy's got his own Cronenberg science division and everything.
This would explain all the ships arriving.
You think they're here for Daisy?
And still no sign of May?
Normally, she could hold her own against the Kree. But her leg, it's in bad shape.
It's the Blues. They've come to harvest the children.
